---
title: "Space Matrix"
format: html
fig-cap-location: bottom
categories: [density, quantitative, typology construction, urban fabric]
---

## Why use this method? 


## You are ready to use this method if


## Questions you can answer 


## Steps
### density {#density}
### FSI {#fsi}
### GSI {#gsi}
### OSR {#osr}
### L {#l}


## Tools

## Cases


## References

## Exercises
### Exercise 1
